prestazioni: F20C1 (AP1) engine stroked to 2.2L using a Toda Racing forged crankshaft (89mm stroke) paired with Toda Racing forged pistons (87mm bore, 12.5:1 CR) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods, retaining the stock F20C1 cylinder sleeves for optimal heat dissipation and rigidity.

Full titanium valvetrain upgrade with Supertech titanium intake valves (35mm), Supertech sodium-filled exhaust valves (30mm), and Toda Racing valve springs/retainers, paired with a Toda Racing Type-R camshaft set (272° intake, 264° exhaust, 11.5mm lift) and adjustable cam gears (Toda Racing or HKS) for precise timing under high-RPM track conditions.

Custom forced induction setup utilizing a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing, 0.86 A/R compressor housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold (Hybrid Racing or Full-Race Motorsports), paired with a GReddy Profec B Spec II standalone ECU, AEM 3.5bar MAP sensor, and a custom intercooler core (Garrett 12x12x3.5 bar-and-plate) with 3-inch aluminum piping and HKS SSQV blow-off valve.
estetica: Voltex Type-3 widebody conversion kit (AP1-specific, 30mm front fender flares, 40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (Seibon or VIS Racing) to accommodate 18x9.5 +25 ET front and 18x10.5 +30 ET rear wheels (BBS LM-R or Volk TE37SL).

Custom front splitter and rear diffuser from APR Performance (AP1-specific, 3-piece carbon fiber) with a custom 3D GT wing (AeroLab Development, 65-inch span, 12-inch chord, 3-element design) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals (APR or custom-fabricated) for adjustable angle of attack (0-15°).

Full interior strip with custom roll cage (Custom Cages or Kirk Racing, 8-point bolt-in with gusseted main hoop, AP1-specific door bars, and harness bar) paired with Bride Zeta III recliners (HANS-compatible), Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, and a custom carbon fiber dashboard (Seibon) housing a Motec C127 dash logger and AIM MXS Strada display.
